# OILTAC Clean Combustion

> OILTAC is an enzyme-based diesel fuel additive manufactured by Fukasawa Chemical Laboratory (Tokyo, Japan) and distributed in North America by Chie Tsiang Enterprise. Dosed at 1:10,000, it improves combustion efficiency, reduces fuel consumption, and suppresses exhaust emissions without engine modification. Validated across marine, rail, and power generation applications through independent testing spanning 1960–2005.

## Core Pages

- [Proof](https://oiltacfuel.com/proof): Independent test evidence from marine, rail, and power generation trials — fuel consumption, emissions, engine wear, and deposit data
- [Industries](https://oiltacfuel.com/industries): Target applications including maritime tugboat and port operations, inland vessel fleets, power generation, and mining
- [Benefits](https://oiltacfuel.com/#benefits): Operational outcomes — fuel savings, reduced lube oil consumption, cleaner injectors, lower exhaust emissions, extended maintenance intervals
- [Calculator](https://oiltacfuel.com/fuel-calculator): ROI and fuel savings estimator based on fleet size, fuel consumption, and treatment cost
- [Why Now](https://oiltacfuel.com/#why-now): Context for why OILTAC is being introduced to North American operators now, including regulatory and cost pressures
- [Our Story](https://oiltacfuel.com/about-us): Heritage of Fukasawa Chemical Laboratory, product lineage since 1974, and how OILTAC reached North America

## Key Resources

- [Request a Pilot](https://oiltacfuel.com/#pilot-cta): 45–60 day field trial program; operators test on their own equipment using their own fuel records
- [Contact / Sales](mailto:info@oiltacfuel.com): Direct inquiry and pilot request

## Product Reference

- [Full Technical Reference](https://oiltacfuel.com/oiltac.md): Complete product and test data in machine-readable markdown — formulation, dosage, test results, physical properties, pricing, and pilot structure

## Optional

- [SDS / Safety Data Sheet](https://oiltacfuel.com/msds): Flash point 62.5°C, Hazard Class III, Specific Gravity 0.78–0.80
- [Packaging Information](https://oiltacfuel.com/oiltac.md#packaging): Available in 1L, 15L, 20L, and 200L UN-certified containers
